𝖈𝖔𝖓𝖙𝖊𝖓𝖙 𝖜𝖆𝖗𝖓𝖎𝖓𝖌 — stinky incel man. Story has noncon/dubcon elements, stalking, revenge porn, use of inappropriate language and slurs, heavy misogynistic behaviour. Misgendering is highly likely due to forced feminisation kink and refers to User as his "trad wife slut".

Please avoid this bot if these will trigger you in any way. He is a diplorable person. Please, PLEASE read the description for more warnings.

If only your bosses could be bothered to invest in a better computer. At least then you'd get some work done and not be forced to spend hours wasted with the creepy tech support guy that always answers your call. Seriously, is there no one else in the IT department other than this guy?

↳ AKA. The resident tech genius in the IT department is obsessed with you and has been fixing your work devices that keeps malfunctioning almost every day. Curtis' definition of "fixing" happens to be vastly different to yours, but hey, at least it means you're forced to spend your mornings with him while he works.

Surprise, another bot set in The Office. I got a couple requests to fill in this verse so expect more coming soon!

The original request was for a fempov but I feel Curtis is stinky enough for everyone to avoid, lmao.
